allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add mobile-friendly controls and responsive design

Features:
- Touch control buttons for mobile devices
- Swipe gestures on canvas
- Responsive canvas that scales on mobile
- Optimized layout for phone screens
- Prevent zoom and improve touch handling

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add premium game juice effects and power-up system

Phase 1 Features:
- Particle explosion system with physics
- Screen shake effects on impacts and eating
- Score popup animations (+10 floating text)
- Power-up system: Shield, Ghost, Speed, Magnet
- Pulsing food and power-ups with glow effects
- Visual indicators for active power-ups
- Ghost mode allows passing through walls
- Shield protects from collisions
- Enhanced visual feedback throughout

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add multiple game modes and combo system

Phase 2 Features:
- Mode selection screen with 4 game modes
- Classic Mode: Traditional endless gameplay
- Time Attack Mode: 60-second challenge
- Survival Mode: 3 lives with progressive difficulty
- Zen Mode: No walls, relaxing flow gameplay
- Combo system: Earn multipliers for quick eating (up to 5x)
- Progressive speed increase in Survival mode
- Mode-specific high scores saved separately
- Lives system for Survival mode
- Timer display for Time Attack mode
- Visual feedback for combos
- Enhanced game over screen with mode stats

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add visual themes, settings menu, and sound effects

Phase 3 Features:
- 5 visual themes: Classic, Neon Cyberpunk, Retro 8-bit, Dark Mode, Ocean
- Theme selection system with live preview
- Settings menu with gear icon
- Sound effects system using Web Audio API
- Sounds for eating, power-ups, death, and UI interactions
- Sound toggle switch in settings
- Theme and sound preferences saved to localStorage
- Dynamic color system for snake, food, and UI
- Smooth theme transitions
- Professional settings UI with animations

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add achievements system and statistics tracking

Phase 4 Features:
- 13 achievements to unlock
- Achievement notification system with animations
- Statistics tracking (games, score, food, deaths, etc.)
- Power-up collection tracking
- Mode and theme usage tracking
- Achievement progress shown in game over screen
- Persistent achievement and stats storage
- Visual achievement popups during gameplay
- Combo and snake length achievements
- Mode-specific achievements (Speed Demon, Survivor, Zen Master)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add enhanced power-ups and golden apple system

Phase 5 Features:
- New power-ups: Freeze ❄️ (slows time), 2x Score Multiplier ✖️
- Golden Apple 👑 system (30 points, rare spawn)
- Power-up spawns increased to 6 types
- Score multiplier stacks with combos for massive points
- Visual indicators for all active power-ups
- Golden apple with intense glow and larger explosion
- Special food timer system (10 second window)
- Enhanced scoring with multiplier bonuses
- Better visual feedback for special items

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add backend server and global leaderboard system

Phase 6 Features:
- Node.js + Express backend server
- REST API for leaderboards
- Global leaderboard with mode-specific rankings
- Score submission system
- Top 100 rankings per mode
- Player name registration
- Medal system (🥇🥈🥉 for top 3)
- JSON file database (easy to migrate)
- Leaderboard UI with tabs
- Automatic score submission on game over
- Player rank display
- API health check endpoint

Backend API:
- GET /api/leaderboard/:mode - View rankings
- POST /api/score - Submit score
- GET /api/stats - Global statistics
- GET /api/health - Health check

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
